All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AbstractMockIdp
 
AbstractMockProvider
Base class for mock CatalogProvider implementations.
AccessRequest
Represents an access request in the system.
AccessRequestEntity
 
AccessRequestResource
REST Resource for managing the lifecycle of data access requests.
AccessRequestResource.HalAccessRequest
HATEOAS wrapper for AccessRequest providing navigation links.
AccessRequestResource.RejectionRequest
Helper DTO for rejection requests.
AccessRequestService
Service for managing the lifecycle of access requests, including submission, approval orchestration, and status tracking.
AcsSecurityIdentityAugmentor
Augments the authenticated SecurityIdentity with ACS-specific personas and groups.
AtlanNodeProvider
 
AuditEntry
Record representing an entry in the audit log.
AuditEntryEntity
 
AuditResource
 
AuditService
 
AuthResource
 
AzureAdIdentityProvider
 
CatalogNode
Represents a node in a data catalog (e.g., catalog, database, schema, table).
CatalogProvider
Interface for catalog metadata providers.
CatalogRegistration
Data transfer object for catalog registrations.
CatalogRegistrationResource
REST Resource for dynamic catalog registration and management.
CatalogResource
REST resource for interacting with data catalogs.
CatalogService
Orchestrates operations across multiple data catalog providers (e.g., Unity Catalog, AWS Glue).
DatabaseAccessRequestService
JPA-based implementation of the AccessRequestService.
DatabaseAuditService
JPA-based implementation of the AuditService.
DatabaseBootstrapValidator
Validates database connectivity on startup with clear error messages to distinguish between network and authentication issues.
DatabaseUserService
JPA-based implementation of the UserService.
DatabricksClient
 
DatabricksNodeProvider
 
DataHubNodeProvider
Mock implementation of a CatalogProvider for DataHub.
DefaultCatalogService
Default implementation of the CatalogService.
GenericOidcIdentityProvider
Real OIDC implementation using Quarkus OIDC Client.
GenericSamlIdentityProvider
Basic implementation for SAML 2.0 Identity Providers.
GlueNodeProvider
 
GravitinoNodeProvider
 
Group
Represents a group in the system.
GroupEntity
 
HiveMetastoreNodeProvider
 
IcebergNodeProvider
 
IdentityProvider
Interface for 3rd-party identity providers.
LineageService
Service for emitting data lineage events using the OpenLineage standard.
LoginRequest
Data transfer object for login requests.
MetastoreResource
 
MockIdentityProvider
Mock Identity Provider for local development and demo purposes.
MyLivenessCheck
 
MyRemoteService
To use it via injection.
MyRemoteService.Extension
 
NodeType
 
OktaIdentityProvider
 
OpenApiConfig
Global OpenAPI configuration for ACS Backend.
Persona
Defines the available system-wide personas in the ACS.
PolarisNodeProvider
 
PolicyRequest
Data transfer object for policy application requests.
ProxyResource
 
ServiceLivenessCheck
 
ServiceReadinessCheck
 
SqlRequest
Record representing a SQL execution request.
TokenService
 
UiLogRequest
Data transfer object for UI log events sent from the frontend.
UnityCatalogNodeProvider
Mock implementation of a CatalogProvider for Unity Catalog (OSS).
User
Represents a user in the system.
UserEntity
 
UserResource
REST Resource for managing users and group memberships.
UserService
Interface for user and group management, providing CRUD operations and persona assignments.
